start.greeting:
👋 Hello! I'm your AI wrestling assistant. Ask me anything about wrestling — techniques, rules, famous wrestlers, and more.

Use /help to see what I can do.
error.generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again.
rate_limit.reached: 🚦 You've reached the daily limit of {limit} messages. Try again tomorrow.
roll.invalid: 🎲 Give me a whole number of sides between {min} and {max}, e.g. /roll 20
language.changed: ✅ Language has been changed to English.
remember.usage: 📝 Usage: /remember <something you want me to remember>
recall.none: 🧠 You haven't asked me to remember anything yet. Use /remember <text>.
forget.invalid: Give me the number of a note to forget (see /recall), e.g. /forget 2 — or just /forget to clear them all.
help.header: 🤖 Here's what I can help you with:
help.remember: /remember — save a note (e.g. /remember I train on Mondays)
help.forget: /forget — clear one note (/forget 2) or all of them
model.current:
Current provider: {provider}

Options:
/model main — Cerebras (fast, multilingual, with memory)
/model hf — ArmGPT (Armenian only, slow, no memory)
model.invalid: Invalid choice. Use: /model main or /model hf
model.save_failed: Could not save preference. Try again later.
model.switched_hf:
Switched to hf (ArmGPT).

Note: this is a tiny base completion model trained only on Armenian text. It will continue whatever you write rather than answer questions, and it does not understand English. Replies take ~30-60s and there is no memory.
